AI & Analytics

JobSphere AI – Intelligent Job Aggregation & Market Analytics Platform

A full-stack job intelligence platform that aggregates job listings from multiple sources into a unified interface with live market trend visualizations.

React.jsFastAPIPostgreSQLTailwind CSSRechartsFramer Motion
Business Automation

Smart Billing & WhatsApp Invoice Management System

A web-based paperless billing application for retail stores that generates invoices, stores them securely, and sends them via the WhatsApp Business API.

React.jsDjango REST FrameworkPostgreSQLWhatsApp APIJWT
IoT & Self-Service

SmartPay PrintHub – IoT-Based Self-Service Printing Kiosk

A web-based printing kiosk system where users upload documents via QR or local device, pay via UPI/Razorpay, and print automatically without manual help.

DjangoPostgreSQLUPI QR / RazorpayPDF.jsQRCode.jsBootstrap
